subject: feat(config): expand to 15 WordPress-era look presets (one per year)
body:
Replace the 5 era-grouped WP looks with 15 individual looks, one for
each WordPress default theme year (2010–2025, skipping 2018):

Era 1 — Fixed Layouts (2010–2013):
  Heritage (Lora+Lato), Neutral (Raleway), Airy (Open Sans),
  Vivid (Bitter+Source Sans)

Era 2 — Mobile-First (2014–2017):
  Magazine (Lato), Readable (Noto Sans+Serif), Typeset
  (Merriweather+Montserrat), Enterprise (Libre Franklin)

Era 3 — Block-Aware Classic (2019–2021):
  Gutenberg (Inter+Lora), Warmth (Inter), Pastel (Manrope)

Era 4 — Block Theme Revolution (2022–2025):
  Botanical (Source Serif+Inter), Fluid (DM Sans), Editorial
  (Cardo+Inter), Flux (Manrope+Literata)

Also adds Noto Sans font to support TT15's heading/body pairing.

Tags: config, looks, fonts, wordpress, design-tokens
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
